disclosures.description: The whitepaper represents a foundational document providing a comprehensive disclosure of the asset's structure, purpose, and operational details.
disclosures.evidence: Uniswap is a decentralized trading protocol that facilitates automated trading of decentralized finance (DeFi) tokens through an Automated Market Maker (AMM) mechanism.

disclosures.description: The whitepaper must include an explicit disclosure of potential risks.
disclosures.evidence: Participation in DeFi protocols carries risks including smart contract risk, impermanent loss, and regulatory uncertainty.

disclosures.description: The identity of the issuer must be clearly stated.
disclosures.evidence: Uniswap Labs is the primary development team behind the Uniswap protocol.

disclosures.description: A legal disclaimer must be present in the documentation.
The project must implement robust KYC and AML processes.
All marketing activities must be consistent with whitepaper disclosures.
